title: MUSE-ALMA Haloes XIII. Molecular gas in $z \sim 0.5$ HI-selected galaxies
comment: 17 pages, 7 figures. Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: We present new results from the MUSE-ALMA Haloes survey, covering 79 galaxies associated with strong HI absorption at redshift about 0.5. Our ALMA Cycle 10 observations add 39 systems to the initial 21, bringing the total to 60 galaxies. CO emission is detected in 9 new galaxies, and in 12 of 60 total, doubling the number of CO-emitting HI-selected galaxies and probing 1.2 dex deeper in molecular gas mass than previous studies. These galaxies span a wide range of stellar masses and metallicities. By comparing CO(2-1) and CO(3-2) properties with star formation rates and gas-phase metallicities from VLT/MUSE and HST, we find a dual behaviour in star formation efficiency: low-mass systems follow main-sequence scaling relations, while high-mass systems show suppressed star formation. This diversity indicates that HI absorbers trace both evolved and younger galaxies, providing a key step toward completing the baryon census at redshift about 0.5.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了MUSE-ALMA Haloes巡天的新结果，涵盖了79个与红移约0.5处强HI吸收相关的星系。我们的ALMA第10周期观测在最初的21个系统基础上新增了39个，使总数达到60个星系。在9个新星系中探测到CO发射，总计60个星系中有12个探测到CO，使CO发射的HI选择星系数量翻倍，并且分子气体质量的探测深度比以往研究深1.2 dex。这些星系跨越了广泛的恒星质量和金属丰度范围。通过将CO(2-1)和CO(3-2)性质与来自VLT/MUSE和HST的恒星形成速率及气相金属丰度进行比较，我们发现恒星形成效率存在双重行为：低质量系统遵循主序标度关系，而高质量系统则表现出恒星形成受抑制。这种多样性表明HI吸收体同时追踪演化成熟和年轻星系，为完成红移约0.5处的重子物质普查迈出了关键一步。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：HI吸收体同时追踪演化成熟和年轻星系，为完成红移约0.5处的重子物质普查迈出关键一步。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of CO-detections (blue) and non-CO-detections (light blue) on galaxies as a function of redshift (left) and stellar mass (middle). The right panel is plotted as a function of metallicity corresponding to multiple galaxies associated with the absorbers (Halley et al., in prep). This figure represents the MUSE-ALMA Haloes survey, including all the sources from the new ALMA Large Program and previous ALMA data (see Section 2.2 ). The middle and right panels have fewer numbers because only those with reliable \(M_{\star}\) and [M/H] determinations are included. The median values for the detections are 0.6, 9.66 and \(-1.23\) for the redshift, stellar mass and absorption metallicity, while the non-detections have median values of 0.5, 9.16, and \(-1.84\) . Overall, we report no clear correlation between the detection rate and any of these properties, suggesting that the detection of CO emission may be governed by a combination of global galaxy properties, rather than just one property alone.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：CO探测（蓝色）和非CO探测（浅蓝色）星系作为红移（左）和恒星质量（中）函数的分布。右图绘制了与吸收体相关的多个星系的金属丰度函数（Halley et al., in prep）。此图展示了MUSE-ALMA Haloes巡天，包括来自新ALMA大型计划及先前ALMA数据的所有源（见第2.2节）。中图和右图数量较少，因为仅包含具有可靠\(M_{\star}\)和[M/H]测定的星系。探测的中位值分别为红移0.6、恒星质量9.66和吸收金属丰度\(-1.23\)，而非探测的中位值为0.5、9.16和\(-1.84\)。总体而言，我们未发现探测率与这些性质中的任何一个存在明确相关性，这表明CO发射的探测可能由星系整体性质的组合决定，而非单一性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: CO detections and spectral profiles of the new nine detected sources. Left panels show the moment zero maps with the \(\pm\) 3, \(\pm\) 4, and \(\pm\) 5 \(\sigma\) level contours, while the right panels display the extracted CO spectra. The grey shaded regions around each spectrum represent the \(\pm 1\sigma\) RMS noise level estimate from the individual data cubes, and the blue shaded region indicates the velocity range used to create the moment maps. The final row, right figure, presents the rest-frame stacked spectrum of non-detections with \(\pm 1\sigma\) and \(\pm 2\sigma\) levels. A summary of the integrated CO fluxes and associated uncertainties for all detected sources is provided in Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：新探测到的九个源的CO探测和光谱轮廓。左图显示零阶矩图，带有\(\pm\) 3、\(\pm\) 4和\(\pm\) 5 \(\sigma\)等值线，右图显示提取的CO光谱。每个光谱周围的灰色阴影区域表示来自单个数据立方体的\(\pm 1\sigma\) RMS噪声水平估计，蓝色阴影区域表示用于创建矩图的速度范围。最后一行右图显示了非探测的静止帧叠加光谱，带有\(\pm 1\sigma\)和\(\pm 2\sigma\)水平。所有探测源的积分CO通量及相关不确定性的总结见表1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Different \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\) models across varying metallicites. In this work, we adopt the model proposed by Genzel et al. ( 2015 ) , shown in the blue points, which corresponds to the geometric mean of the prescriptions of Bolatto et al. ( 2013 ) and Genzel et al. ( 2012 ) , as indicated in Eq. 3 . As a reference, we also include the model proposed by Accurso et al. ( 2017 ) , which would lead to higher values for \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\) for the galaxies in our sample. To prevent extrapolation into poorly constrained regions of parameter space, we impose an upper limit on \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\) , set to the lowest emission metallicity measured in our sample, which leads to an \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\sim 15\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：不同金属丰度下的\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\)模型。在本工作中，我们采用Genzel等人（2015）提出的模型，以蓝点表示，该模型对应于Bolatto等人（2013）和Genzel等人（2012）方案的几何平均值，如公式3所示。作为参考，我们还包含了Accurso等人（2017）提出的模型，该模型会导致我们样本中星系的\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\)值更高。为避免外推到参数空间约束较差的区域，我们对\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\)设置了一个上限，设定为我们样本中测得的最低发射金属丰度，这导致\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\sim 15\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: Molecular gas mass ( \(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) ) as a function of H i column density ( \(N_{\text{HI}}\) ). Blue circles represent our sample in comparison with previous studies on H i -absorption selected systems from kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018 and klitschH2MolecularGas2021 , shown in grey. Right: \(N_{\text{HI}}\) and impact parameter, colour coded by the molecular gas masses. In this plot, we include all impact parameters for the sources in our sample, rather than limiting to the smallest \(b\) as done in previous studies (e.g. perouxSINFONIIntegralField2016 ; Hamanowicz et al. 2020 ; wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2022 ) . The circles represent CO detections, and the triangle represents non-CO detections. We also include the median radial profiles for the neutral hydrogen column density from the simulations by voortCosmologicalSimulationsCircumgalactic2019 and nelsonResolvingSmallscaleCold2020 in the dashed and dotted lines, respectively. We report no clear correlation between the column density and impact parameter for different molecular gas masses.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左：分子气体质量（\(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)）作为HI柱密度（\(N_{\text{HI}}\)）的函数。蓝色圆圈代表我们的样本，与来自kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018和klitschH2MolecularGas2021的先前HI吸收选择系统研究（灰色）进行比较。右：\(N_{\text{HI}}\)和碰撞参数，按分子气体质量着色。在此图中，我们包含了样本中所有源的碰撞参数，而非像先前研究（例如perouxSINFONIIntegralField2016；Hamanowicz et al. 2020；wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2022）那样仅限于最小的\(b\)。圆圈代表CO探测，三角形代表非CO探测。我们还分别以虚线和点线形式包含了来自voortCosmologicalSimulationsCircumgalactic2019和nelsonResolvingSmallscaleCold2020模拟的中性氢柱密度中值径向轮廓。我们未报告不同分子气体质量的柱密度与碰撞参数之间存在明确相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left: Star formation rate (SFR) as a function of molecular gas mass ( \(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) ). Right: Stellar mass ( \(M_{\star}\) ) as a function of molecular gas mass ( \(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) ). Our sample is shown in blue circles, and the blue arrows represent a \(3\sigma\) upper limit. The result from the stacked spectrum described in Sect. 3.2 is shown by the blue star. We also include the mean dust correction for SFR depicted by a large blue arrow on the corner of the left panel. For comparison, we include data from the xCOLD GASS survey ( saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017 ) , which represents low-redshift galaxies, and the PHIBSS survey ( tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 ) , in the redshift range \(z\sim 0.3-1.2\) . The solid line represents the molecular gas main sequence scaling relation from tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 . We also included estimates from kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018 and klitschH2MolecularGas2021 in both panels, labelled as other H i –selected systems. Our sources with \(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}\lesssim 10^{9.8}\) lie \(\sim 0.3\) dex above the expected SFR \(-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) relations for ‘normal star-forming galaxies’ at the same redshift range, while the systems with with \(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}>10^{9.8}\) lie \(\sim 1.5\) dex below the relation. This trend suggests that H i –selected systems have a dual behaviour. Galaxies with low molecular gas masses form stars efficiently, following both the depletion timescales and the \(M_{\star}-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) scaling relations of main-sequence galaxies. In contrast, galaxies with high molecular gas masses show inefficient star formation and fall below the expected stellar mass growth, likely because they are still actively accreting gas from the intergalactic medium or interacting within group environments. These systems appear not yet to have reached the equilibrium conditions characteristic of main-sequence galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左：恒星形成速率（SFR）作为分子气体质量（\(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)）的函数。右：恒星质量（\(M_{\star}\)）作为分子气体质量（\(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)）的函数。我们的样本以蓝色圆圈显示，蓝色箭头表示\(3\sigma\)上限。第3.2节描述的叠加光谱结果以蓝色星形显示。我们还包含了左图角落处一个大蓝色箭头所示的SFR平均尘埃校正。作为比较，我们包含了代表低红移星系的xCOLD GASS巡天（saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017）和红移范围\(z\sim 0.3-1.2\)的PHIBSS巡天（tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018）的数据。实线代表来自tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018的分子气体主序标度关系。我们还在两个面板中包含了来自kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018和klitschH2MolecularGas2021的估计，标记为其他HI选择系统。我们的\(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}\lesssim 10^{9.8}\)的源位于相同红移范围内“正常恒星形成星系”的预期SFR \(-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)关系之上约\(\sim 0.3\) dex，而\(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}>10^{9.8}\)的系统位于该关系之下约\(\sim 1.5\) dex。这一趋势表明HI选择系统具有双重行为。分子气体质量低的星系高效形成恒星，遵循主序星系的耗尽时标和\(M_{\star}-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)标度关系。相比之下，分子气体质量高的星系表现出低效的恒星形成，并低于预期的恒星质量增长，这可能是因为它们仍在从星系际介质活跃吸积气体或在群环境中相互作用。这些系统似乎尚未达到主序星系特征的平衡条件。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Left: Nebular emission metallicity, \(12+\log\) (O/H) ( wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2023 ) , as a function of molecular gas mass ( \(M_{{H}_{2}}\) ) for our H i –selected galaxies. Blue circles indicate CO detections, and blue leftward arrows show \(3\sigma\) upper limits for CO non-detections. The result from the stacked spectrum described in Sect. 3.2 is shown by the blue star. The solid line indicates the mass-metallicity relation from Genzel et al. ( 2015 ) for the PHIBSS sample ( tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 ) . A positive correlation emerges between metallicity and CO detectability, with CO-detected galaxies tending to occupy the higher-metallicity regime ( \(\log Z\gtrsim 8.5\) ), as found previously in many studies (e.g., Bolatto et al. 2013 ) . Right: Histogram of emission metallicities for all galaxies, with CO detections in blue and non-detections in light blue filled histogram. The dashed orange line indicates a metallicity \(\log Z\sim 8.5\) , which sets the higher and lower metallicity regimes discussed in Sect. 5 . Although the distributions overlap significantly, a two-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov test yields a p-value of 0.004, indicating a statistically significant difference in the underlying metallicity distributions. This reinforces the interpretation that metallicity plays a key role in governing the observability of molecular gas in H i –selected systems.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：左：我们HI选择星系的星云发射金属丰度\(12+\log\) (O/H)（wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2023）作为分子气体质量（\(M_{{H}_{2}}\)）的函数。蓝色圆圈表示CO探测，蓝色左向箭头表示CO非探测的\(3\sigma\)上限。第3.2节描述的叠加光谱结果以蓝色星形显示。实线表示来自Genzel等人（2015）的PHIBSS样本（tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018）的质量-金属丰度关系。金属丰度与CO可探测性之间呈现正相关，CO探测星系倾向于占据较高金属丰度区域（\(\log Z\gtrsim 8.5\)），这与先前许多研究（例如Bolatto et al. 2013）的发现一致。右：所有星系的发射金属丰度直方图，CO探测以蓝色填充，非探测以浅蓝色填充。橙色虚线表示金属丰度\(\log Z\sim 8.5\)，这设定了第5节讨论的高和低金属丰度区域。尽管分布显著重叠，双样本Kolmogorov-Smirnov检验得出p值为0.004，表明底层金属丰度分布存在统计显著差异。这强化了金属丰度在控制HI选择系统中分子气体可观测性方面起关键作用的解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Molecular gas depletion time ( \(t_{\text{dep}}=M_{\text{H}_{2}}/\text{SFR}\) ) as a function of redshift for our H i –selected sample (blue/light-blue circles for high/low molecular gas mass systems), compares with literature scaling relations and emission-selected samples ( saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017 ; tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 ) . The result from the stacked spectrum described in Sect. 3.2 is shown by the blue star. The solid red curve shows the empirically derived \(t_{\text{dep}}\) evolution for main-sequence galaxies from tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 , the dotted line marks the Hubble time at each redshift, the thin solid line represents the stellar mass doubling time ( \(t_{*}=M_{\star}/\text{SFR}\) ) from tacconiEvolutionStarFormingInterstellar2020 , and the purple dashed line is from the cosmic depletion timescales derived from the ALMACAL survey (Bollo et al. 2025 ) . H i –selected galaxies, both from our sample and from high-redshift literature sources (gray dots; klitschH2MolecularGas2021 ; neelemanMolecularEmissionGalaxy2018 ; neelemanColdMassiveRotating2020 ; neelemanII158Mm2025 ; Fynbo et al. 2018 ; kanekarHighMolecularGas2020 ; kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018 ; kaurMassiveDustyHi2022 ; kaurMassiveIabsorptionselectedGalaxy2025 ), consistently lie above the main-sequence relation, indicating lower star formation efficiencies. Several galaxies exhibit \(t_{\text{dep}}\) approaching or exceeding the Hubble time, suggesting inefficient molecular gas consumption or suppressed star formation.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：我们HI选择样本（高/低分子气体质量系统分别用蓝色/浅蓝色圆圈表示）的分子气体耗尽时标（\(t_{\text{dep}}=M_{\text{H}_{2}}/\text{SFR}\)）作为红移的函数，与文献标度关系和发射选择样本（saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017；tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018）进行比较。第3.2节描述的叠加光谱结果以蓝色星形显示。红色实线曲线显示了来自tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018的主序星系经验推导的\(t_{\text{dep}}\)演化，点线标记每个红移处的哈勃时间，细实线代表来自tacconiEvolutionStarFormingInterstellar2020的恒星质量倍增时间（\(t_{*}=M_{\star}/\text{SFR}\)），紫色虚线来自ALMACAL巡天（Bollo et al. 2025）推导的宇宙耗尽时标。HI选择星系，无论是来自我们的样本还是高红移文献源（灰点；klitschH2MolecularGas2021；neelemanMolecularEmissionGalaxy2018；neelemanColdMassiveRotating2020；neelemanII158Mm2025；Fynbo et al. 2018；kanekarHighMolecularGas2020；kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018；kaurMassiveDustyHi2022；kaurMassiveIabsorptionselectedGalaxy2025），始终位于主序关系之上，表明恒星形成效率较低。几个星系的\(t_{\text{dep}}\)接近或超过哈勃时间，表明分子气体消耗低效或恒星形成受抑制。

title: New CDM Crisis Revealed by Multi-Scale Cluster Lensing
summary: The properties of substructure in galaxy clusters, exquisitely probed by gravitational lensing, offer a stringent test of dark matter models. Combining strong and weak lensing data for massive clusters, we map their total mass--dominated by dark matter--over the dynamic range needed to confront small-scale predictions for collisionless cold dark matter (CDM). Using state-of-the-art lens models, we extract four key subhalo properties: the mass function, projected radial distribution, internal density profile, and tidal truncation radius. We find that the subhalo mass function and truncation radii are consistent with CDM expectations. In contrast, the inner density profiles and radial distribution of subhalos are strongly discrepant with CDM. The incidence of galaxy-galaxy strong lensing (GGSL) from subhalo cores exceeds CDM predictions by nearly an order of magnitude, requiring inner density slopes as steep as $γ\gtrsim 2.5$ within $r \lesssim 0.01\,R_{200}$ consistent with core-collapsed self-interacting dark matter (SIDM), while the same subhalos behave as collisionless in their outskirts. Additionally, the observed radial distribution of subhalos hosting bright cluster member galaxies, explicitly modeled in the lens reconstructions, remains incompatible with CDM. Together, these small-scale stress tests reveal an intriguing paradox and challenge the dark matter microphysics of purely collisionless CDM and motivate hybrid scenarios, such as a dual-component model with both CDM and SIDM, or entirely new classes of dark matter theories.

AI.tldr: 星系团子结构观测与冷暗物质模型存在矛盾：子晕质量函数和潮汐截断半径符合CDM预测，但内部密度轮廓和径向分布与CDM强烈不符，特别是星系-星系强引力透镜发生率比CDM预测高近一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 通过引力透镜精确探测星系团子结构，为暗物质模型提供严格测试，特别是检验冷暗物质在小尺度上的预测。
AI.method: 结合强透镜和弱透镜数据，使用最先进的透镜模型，提取子晕的四个关键属性：质量函数、投影径向分布、内部密度轮廓和潮汐截断半径。
AI.result: 子晕质量函数和截断半径与CDM预期一致，但内部密度轮廓和径向分布与CDM强烈不符。星系-星系强引力透镜发生率比CDM预测高近一个数量级，需要内部密度斜率γ≳2.5，这与核心坍缩的自相互作用暗物质一致。
AI.conclusion: 这些小尺度压力测试揭示了有趣的悖论，挑战了纯碰撞冷暗物质的微观物理，并支持混合模型（如CDM+SIDM双组分模型）或全新类别的暗物质理论。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团中次结构性质通过引力透镜效应得到精细探测，为暗物质模型提供了严格检验。结合强透镜和弱透镜数据，我们对大质量星系团的总质量（主要由暗物质主导）进行了成像，覆盖了与无碰撞冷暗物质（CDM）小尺度预言进行对比所需的动态范围。利用最先进的透镜模型，我们提取了四个关键次晕性质：质量函数、投影径向分布、内部密度轮廓和潮汐截断半径。我们发现次晕质量函数和截断半径与CDM预期一致。相反，次晕的内部密度轮廓和径向分布与CDM存在强烈差异。来自次晕核心的星系-星系强透镜（GGSL）发生率超出CDM预言近一个数量级，要求内部密度斜率在$r \lesssim 0.01\,R_{200}$内陡峭至$\gamma\gtrsim 2.5$，这与核心坍缩的自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）一致，而相同的次晕在其外围表现为无碰撞。此外，在透镜重建中明确建模的、承载明亮星系团成员星系的次晕的观测径向分布仍与CDM不相容。总之，这些小尺度压力测试揭示了一个有趣的悖论，挑战了纯无碰撞CDM的暗物质微观物理，并激发了混合场景，例如包含CDM和SIDM的双组分模型，或全新类别的暗物质理论。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些小尺度压力测试揭示了有趣的悖论，挑战了纯无碰撞冷暗物质的微观物理，并支持混合模型（如CDM+SIDM双组分模型）或全新类别的暗物质理论。

The inset axes show the run of \(\log\rho\) versus \(\log r\) (not to scale).

figures.caption_en: Figure A1: Left: 3D radial distribution of the subhalos in our TNG-C cluster analogs (dashed, color-coded as indicated) compared to the force-disruption-free benchmark taken from Hopkins et al. 2023 (black solid). We show the cumulative number of all subhalos with more than 20 DM particles, normalized to the total number within the respective \(2R_{200}\) . To explicitly account for the artificial disruption of the inner subhalos, we artificially “inject” subhalos within \(0.5R_{200}\) by sampling weighted by the deficit within \(0.5R_{200}\) between the TNG-C and benchmark cumulative distributions (see the text for details). Three random examples of such modified subhalo radial distributions (dotted) are plotted that well match the benchmark distribution. Right: projected radial distribution of the subhalos hosting member galaxies in observed clusters (color-shaded, as in the top panel of Figure 2 ) and in simulated analogs with injected inner subhalos. The solid (dotted) lines show the mean ( \(1\sigma\) confidence interval) inferred from 1 million bootstrapping iterations. Within the projected radius of \(\lesssim 0.2R_{200}\) , individual radial bins remain \(5\sigma\) – \(40\sigma\) discrepant with the observed abundance, even after explicitly accounting for numerical uncertainties due to artificial disruption.
figures.caption_zh: 图A1：左：TNG-C星系团类似物中次晕的3D径向分布（虚线，按指示颜色编码），与取自Hopkins等人2023年的无力瓦解基准（黑色实线）比较。我们展示了所有包含超过20个暗物质粒子的次晕的累积数量，归一化到各自\(2R_{200}\)内的总数。为了明确考虑内部次晕的人为瓦解，我们通过在\(0.5R_{200}\)内按TNG-C与基准累积分布之间的差值（详见正文）加权采样，人为“注入”\(0.5R_{200}\)内的次晕。绘制了三个这样的修正次晕径向分布（虚线）的随机示例，它们与基准分布匹配良好。右：观测星系团中（彩色阴影，如图2上图）和具有注入内部次晕的模拟类似物中承载成员星系的次晕的投影径向分布。实线（虚线）显示了从100万次自助抽样迭代推断的平均值（\(1\sigma\)置信区间）。在投影半径\(\lesssim 0.2R_{200}\)内，即使在明确考虑了由于人为瓦解导致的数值不确定性之后，单个径向区间仍与观测丰度存在\(5\sigma\) – \(40\sigma\)的差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure A2: Ratios of subhalo tidal radii computed from CDM–SIDM-matched pairs of the L-Cluster run of the SIDM Concerto suite (Nadler et al. , 2025 ) that assumes a Rutherford-like velocity-dependent cross-section model (see the text for details). We show the mean (diamonds), central 68% (triangles), and central 95% (horizontal bars) ranges of each distribution under no subhalo selection (gray) and as selected by instantaneous halocentric radius (purple) or bound mass fraction (red). This comparison is done for the entire CDM–SIDM-matched subhalo sample (left) and for the subsample filtered by requiring the mass-resolution-limited numerical scatter in the bound mass fraction to be less than 0.3 dex (right; Equation ( C1 )). Even in the mildly collisional regime or with velocity-dependent SIDM models, self-interaction-driven core formation leads to substantially higher tidal mass loss and tidal truncation radii statistically discrepant from CDM predictions, by up to an order of magnitude for inner and/or heavily stripped subhalos.
figures.caption_zh: 图A2：从SIDM Concerto套件（Nadler等人，2025）的L-Cluster运行中，假设类卢瑟福速度依赖截面模型（详见正文）的CDM–SIDM匹配对计算的次晕潮汐半径比率。我们展示了在无次晕选择（灰色）以及按瞬时晕心半径（紫色）或束缚质量分数（红色）选择下，每个分布的平均值（菱形）、中心68%（三角形）和中心95%（水平条）范围。此比较针对整个CDM–SIDM匹配次晕样本（左）和通过要求束缚质量分数的质量分辨率限制数值散射小于0.3 dex（右；方程(C1)）过滤的子样本进行。即使在弱碰撞状态或使用速度依赖SIDM模型时，自相互作用驱动的核心形成也会导致显著更高的潮汐质量损失和潮汐截断半径，在统计上与CDM预言不一致，对于内部和/或严重剥离的次晕，差异可达一个数量级。

title: Stellar masses of optically dark galaxies: uncertainty introduced by the attenuation law and star-formation histories
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, to be submitted to MNRAS, comments are welcome
summary: JWST observations have suggested that some high-redshift galaxies may be ultra-massive, thereby challenging standard models of early galaxy formation and cosmology. We analyse the stellar masses using different modelling assumptions and with new data of three galaxies (S1, S2 and S3), whose NIRCam/grism redshifts were consistent with $z>5$. These three optically dark galaxies have previously been reported to host exceptionally high stellar masses and star-formation rates, implying extremely high star-formation efficiencies. Recent NIRSpec/IFU observations for S1 indicate a spectroscopic redshift of $z_{\rm spec}=3.2461^{+0.0001}_{-0.0002}$, which is lower than previously reported. Using the Bayesian spectral energy distribution (SED) modelling tool \texttt{Prospector}, we investigate the impact of key model assumptions on stellar mass estimates, such as the choice of star-formation history (SFH) priors (constant versus rising SFH base for the non-parametric prior), the dust attenuation law, and the treatment of emission line fluxes. Our analysis yields revised stellar masses of $\log(M_{\star}/M_{\odot}) \approx 10.36^{+0.47}_{-0.32}, 10.95^{+0.11}_{-0.10}$ and $10.31^{+0.24}_{-0.19}$ for S1, S2, and S3, respectively. We find that adopting a rising SFH base prior results in lower inferred stellar masses compared to a constant SFH base prior. We identify a significant degeneracy between the dust attenuation curve slope, the amount of dust attenuation, and stellar mass. Our results highlight various systematics in SED modelling due to SFH priors and dust attenuation that can influence stellar mass estimates of heavily dust obscured sources. Nevertheless, even with these revised stellar mass estimates, two of the three galaxies remain among the most massive and actively star-forming systems at their respective redshifts, implying high star-formation efficiencies.

AI.tldr: JWST观测显示某些高红移星系可能超质量，挑战早期星系形成模型。通过重新分析三个星系（S1、S2、S3）的恒星质量，发现先前质量估计过高，S1的红移实际更低。使用Prospector工具考虑不同模型假设（恒星形成历史先验、尘埃衰减规律、发射线处理），得到修正后的恒星质量，揭示SED建模中的系统误差。
AI.motivation: JWST观测表明一些高红移星系可能具有异常高的恒星质量，这与标准早期星系形成和宇宙学模型相矛盾。需要重新评估这些星系的质量估计，考虑不同建模假设的影响，以确定这些星系是否真正挑战现有理论。
AI.method: 使用贝叶斯光谱能量分布（SED）建模工具Prospector，分析三个星系（S1、S2、S3）的数据。研究关键模型假设对恒星质量估计的影响：1）恒星形成历史（SFH）先验的选择（恒定SFH基础 vs 上升SFH基础）；2）尘埃衰减规律；3）发射线通量的处理。特别关注S1的新NIRSpec/IFU观测提供的精确红移数据。
AI.result: S1的精确红移为z=3.2461，低于先前报告值。修正后的恒星质量分别为：S1约10.36±0.47/0.32 log(M⊙)、S2约10.95±0.11/0.10 log(M⊙)、S3约10.31±0.24/0.19 log(M⊙)。发现采用上升SFH基础先验比恒定SFH基础先验得到更低的恒星质量。尘埃衰减曲线斜率、尘埃衰减量与恒星质量之间存在显著简并性。
AI.conclusion: SED建模中恒星形成历史先验和尘埃衰减的系统误差会显著影响尘埃遮蔽源的恒星质量估计。尽管修正后的质量低于先前报告，但其中两个星系在其红移处仍属于最质量最大、恒星形成最活跃的系统，暗示高恒星形成效率。这些结果强调了在解释高红移星系观测时考虑建模系统误差的重要性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST观测表明，一些高红移星系可能质量极大，从而挑战了标准早期星系形成和宇宙学模型。我们利用不同建模假设和新数据分析了三个星系（S1、S2和S3）的恒星质量，这些星系的NIRCam/光栅红移与$z>5$一致。这三个光学暗星系此前被报道拥有异常高的恒星质量和恒星形成率，暗示了极高的恒星形成效率。最近对S1的NIRSpec/IFU观测显示其光谱红移为$z_{\rm spec}=3.2461^{+0.0001}_{-0.0002}$，低于此前报道的值。利用贝叶斯光谱能量分布（SED）建模工具\texttt{Prospector}，我们研究了关键模型假设对恒星质量估计的影响，例如恒星形成历史（SFH）先验的选择（非参数先验的恒定与上升SFH基底）、尘埃消光定律以及发射线通量的处理。我们的分析得出S1、S2和S3的修正恒星质量分别为$\log(M_{\star}/M_{\odot}) \approx 10.36^{+0.47}_{-0.32}, 10.95^{+0.11}_{-0.10}$和$10.31^{+0.24}_{-0.19}$。我们发现，采用上升SFH基底先验相比恒定SFH基底先验会得到更低的推断恒星质量。我们识别出尘埃消光曲线斜率、尘埃消光量和恒星质量之间存在显著的简并性。我们的结果突显了SED建模中由于SFH先验和尘埃消光引起的各种系统误差，这些误差会影响严重尘埃遮蔽源的恒星质量估计。尽管如此，即使采用这些修正后的恒星质量估计，这三个星系中的两个在其各自红移处仍属于质量最大、恒星形成最活跃的系统，暗示了高恒星形成效率。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，SED建模中恒星形成历史先验和尘埃衰减的系统误差会显著影响尘埃遮蔽源的恒星质量估计。尽管修正后的质量低于先前报告，但其中两个星系在其红移处仍属于最质量最大、恒星形成最活跃的系统，暗示高恒星形成效率。这些结果强调了在解释高红移星系观测时考虑建模系统误差的重要性。

title: QED V: Variations in metal loading of galactic winds with element nucleosynthetic origin
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, submitted to MNRAS. Comments welcome
summary: Type Ia supernovae, type II supernovae, and asymptotic giant branch (AGB) stars are important sites of stellar nucleosynthesis, but they differ greatly in their rates, their location within a galaxy, and the mean thermal energy and abundance distribution of their ejecta. In earlier papers in this series we have shown that a significant fraction of metals newly synthesized by type II supernovae are promptly lost to galactic winds -- i.e., galactic winds are metal loaded. Here we investigate whether the elements returned by type Ia supernovae and AGB stars are similarly metal loaded, or whether metal loading varies significantly with nucleosynthetic site. We use a series of high-resolution ``tall box'' simulations of the interstellar medium with the \quokka~GPU-accelerated code, within which we systematically vary the galaxy gas surface density, metallicity, and the scale heights and relative rates of the different nucleosynthetic sources. We show that the metal loadings of galactic winds differ substantially between metals produced by different sources, with typical variations at the level of $\approx 0.3$ dex, a phenomenon we term differential metal loading. Which set of metals suffers preferential loss from this phenomenon varies depending on the galactic environment, and is not easily predictable \textit{a priori}. Our findings call into question the the interpretation of diagnostics of galaxy formation, for example star formation timescales and initial mass functions, based on abundance diagnostics, since the abundance variations upon which these techniques rely are often at levels comparable to those we show can be induced by differential metal loading.

AI.tldr: 研究发现不同核合成源（Ia型超新星、II型超新星、AGB星）产生的金属在星系风中的损失率存在显著差异，这种现象称为"差异金属加载"，会影响星系形成诊断的准确性。
AI.motivation: 之前的研究表明II型超新星新合成的金属会大量通过星系风损失（金属加载）。本研究旨在探究Ia型超新星和AGB星产生的金属是否也有类似的金属加载现象，以及金属加载是否因核合成源的不同而存在显著差异。
AI.method: 使用QUOKKA GPU加速代码进行一系列高分辨率"高盒"星际介质模拟，系统变化星系气体表面密度、金属丰度，以及不同核合成源的标高和相对速率。
AI.result: 不同来源产生的金属在星系风中的金属加载存在显著差异，典型变化约0.3 dex。哪种金属优先损失取决于星系环境，无法先验预测。这种差异金属加载现象会影响基于丰度诊断的星系形成参数推断。
AI.conclusion: 差异金属加载现象对基于元素丰度诊断的星系形成研究（如恒星形成时标和初始质量函数）提出了质疑，因为观测到的丰度变化水平与差异金属加载引起的水平相当。

artifacts.abstract_zh: Ia型超新星、II型超新星和渐近巨星分支（AGB）星是恒星核合成的重要场所，但它们在爆发率、在星系内的位置以及抛射物的平均热能和丰度分布方面存在巨大差异。在本系列的前期论文中，我们已经表明，由II型超新星新合成的金属中有相当一部分会迅速通过星系风流失——即星系风是富含金属的。本文研究由Ia型超新星和AGB星返回的元素是否同样富含金属，或者金属加载是否随核合成场所的不同而显著变化。我们使用一系列高分辨率“高箱”模拟，采用\quokka~GPU加速代码对星际介质进行模拟，在其中系统地改变星系气体面密度、金属丰度以及不同核合成源的标高和相对速率。我们表明，不同来源产生的金属在星系风中的金属加载存在显著差异，典型变化幅度约为$\approx 0.3$ dex，我们将这一现象称为差异金属加载。哪些金属集合会因这一现象而优先损失，取决于星系环境，并且无法先验地轻易预测。我们的发现对基于丰度诊断的星系形成诊断（例如恒星形成时标和初始质量函数）的解释提出了质疑，因为这些技术所依赖的丰度变化水平往往与我们展示的由差异金属加载引起的水平相当。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，差异金属加载现象对基于元素丰度诊断的星系形成研究（如恒星形成时标和初始质量函数）提出了质疑，因为观测到的丰度变化水平与差异金属加载引起的水平相当。

title: Diverse Origins of Broad H$α$ Lines in Heavily Obscured AGNs Revealed by Multi-epoch Spectroscopy
comment: 36 pages, 14 figures including appendices, accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: According to the classical AGN model, broad emission lines originate from the broad-line region (BLR) and are observable only when the attenuation by the dusty torus is small. However, we recently found several heavily-obscured ($A_V > 50$ mag) AGNs with broad H$α$ detections: MCG -3-34-64, UGC 5101, and Mrk 268. To investigate the origin of the observed broad line in these AGNs, we performed multi-epoch optical spectroscopic observations to search for flux variability of the broad H$α$ line. For MCG -3-34-64 and UGC 5101, no significant variability was detected, suggesting that the broad line of these AGNs may arise from sources other than the BLR. Spectral fitting analysis suggests possible large contribution of ionized outflows to the observed broad component of MCG -3-34-64, while both the outflow and scattering by polar material can explain that of UGC 5101. For Mrk 268, we detected a significant ($4.3σ$) flux variation of the broad H$α$ line by using the flux ratio of the H$α$ complex and the [SII]$λ\lambda6716$, 6731 doublet, indicating that the broad line originates directly from the BLR. The lack of significant flux variation in the optical continuum implies that the line of sight to the nucleus of Mrk 268 is mildly obscured. Our results demonstrate that the observed broad H$α$ lines in obscured AGNs likely have multiple origins. Such complexity may introduce additional uncertainties in black hole mass measurements of distant AGNs revealed by e.g., JWST.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在重度遮蔽的AGN中观测到的宽Hα发射线可能具有多种起源，包括电离外流、极区物质散射或直接来自宽线区，这对黑洞质量测量带来额外不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统AGN模型认为宽发射线仅来自宽线区，且只能在尘埃环遮蔽较小时观测到。但最近在几个重度遮蔽AGN中发现了宽Hα线，需要研究这些宽线的起源。
AI.method: 对MCG -3-34-64、UGC 5101和Mrk 268三个重度遮蔽AGN进行多时期光学光谱观测，通过宽Hα线通量变化性分析其起源。使用Hα复合体与[SII]双线的通量比来检测变化。
AI.result: MCG -3-34-64和UGC 5101的宽Hα线无显著变化，可能来自电离外流或极区物质散射。Mrk 268的宽Hα线有4.3σ显著变化，表明直接来自宽线区，且视线方向为轻度遮蔽。
AI.conclusion: 遮蔽AGN中观测到的宽Hα线具有多种起源，这种复杂性可能给JWST等揭示的遥远AGN黑洞质量测量带来额外不确定性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 根据经典活动星系核（AGN）模型，宽发射线起源于宽线区（BLR），且仅当尘埃环的消光较小时才可观测到。然而，我们近期发现了几例具有宽Hα探测的严重遮蔽（A_V > 50 mag）AGN：MCG -3-34-64、UGC 5101 和 Mrk 268。为探究这些AGN中观测到的宽线的起源，我们进行了多历元光学光谱观测，以搜寻宽Hα线的流量变化。对于MCG -3-34-64和UGC 5101，未探测到显著变化，表明这些AGN的宽线可能源自BLR以外的其他来源。光谱拟合分析表明，电离外流可能对MCG -3-34-64的观测宽成分有较大贡献，而外流和极向物质散射均可解释UGC 5101的宽成分。对于Mrk 268，我们利用Hα复合体与[SII]λλ6716, 6731双线的流量比，探测到宽Hα线显著的（4.3σ）流量变化，表明该宽线直接起源于BLR。光学连续谱缺乏显著流量变化，暗示Mrk 268核区的视线方向受到轻度遮蔽。我们的结果表明，遮蔽AGN中观测到的宽Hα线可能具有多种起源。这种复杂性可能给JWST等揭示的遥远AGN的黑洞质量测量带来额外不确定性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：遮蔽AGN中观测到的宽Hα线具有多种起源，这种复杂性可能给JWST等揭示的遥远AGN黑洞质量测量带来额外不确定性。

title: Evidence of sloshing-driven mini-halo formation in the cool-core cluster RXCJ1558.3-1410
summary: Radio mini-halos are perplexing features, typically hosted by X-ray cool-core galaxy clusters. Understanding the connection between thermal X-ray and non-thermal radio emission is key to uncovering their origin. Here, we present a multiwavelength study of the cool-core cluster RXCJ1558.3-1410 using archival Chandra X-ray and wideband uGMRT radio data (Bands 3, 4 and 5). Our improved analysis confirms a previously known X-ray cavity at $\sim$36 kpc south-east of the cluster centre and we report a new cavity at $\sim$42 kpc to the north-west. These cavities suggest that the AGN provides mechanical power of $\sim$$6.0 \times 10^{44}$ erg s$^{-1}$, sufficient to offset radiative cooling in the ICM. We also detect a sharp surface brightness edge at $\sim$72 kpc south-east of the centre, characterised by a temperature jump and pressure continuity, consistent with a cold front, likely caused by gas sloshing from a minor merger. Our uGMRT images reveals an interesting diffuse emission surrounding the brightest cluster galaxy (BCG), with its edge spatially coinciding with the sloshing cold front and roughly with the cooling radius. Furthermore, a low star formation rate and uniform metal abundance up to the sloshing edge are consistent with the earlier findings of suppression of star formation and metallicity homogenisation by mixing core gas through sloshing. Finally, the spatial correlation between the mini-halo and the observed X-ray features indicates that ICM sloshing, rather than AGN feedback, plays a dominant role in powering the proposed radio mini-halo emission.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多波段分析确认了RXCJ1558.3-1410星系团中的X射线空腔、冷锋和射电迷你晕，发现ICM晃动（而非AGN反馈）是驱动射电迷你晕的主要机制。
AI.motivation: 理解射电迷你晕的起源需要揭示热X射线与非热射电辐射之间的关联，特别是在X射线冷核星系团中。
AI.method: 使用钱德拉X射线档案数据和宽频带uGMRT射电数据（波段3、4、5）对冷核星系团RXCJ1558.3-1410进行多波段研究。

AI.conclusion: ICM晃动（而非AGN反馈）在驱动射电迷你晕发射中起主导作用，这通过射电迷你晕与X射线特征（特别是冷锋）的空间相关性得到证实。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 射电迷你晕是令人困惑的特征，通常出现在X射线冷核星系团中。理解热X射线与非热射电辐射之间的联系是揭示其起源的关键。本文利用钱德拉X射线和宽频带uGMRT射电数据（波段3、4和5），对冷核星系团RXCJ1558.3-1410进行了多波段研究。我们的改进分析确认了先前已知的位于星系团中心东南约36 kpc处的X射线空腔，并报告了一个位于西北约42 kpc处的新空腔。这些空腔表明，活动星系核提供了约6.0 × 10^{44} erg s^{-1}的机械功率，足以抵消ICM中的辐射冷却。我们还探测到中心东南约72 kpc处存在一个尖锐的表面亮度边缘，其特征是温度跳跃和压力连续性，与冷锋一致，可能由小并合引起的气体晃动所致。我们的uGMRT图像揭示了围绕最亮星系团星系（BCG）的有趣弥漫辐射，其边缘在空间上与晃动的冷锋以及大致与冷却半径重合。此外，低的恒星形成率和直至晃动边缘的均匀金属丰度，与先前发现的通过晃动混合核心气体抑制恒星形成和均质化金属丰度的结果一致。最后，迷你晕与观测到的X射线特征之间的空间相关性表明，ICM晃动（而非AGN反馈）在驱动所提出的射电迷你晕辐射中起主导作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，ICM晃动（而非AGN反馈）在驱动射电迷你晕发射中起主导作用，这通过射电迷你晕与X射线特征（特别是冷锋）的空间相关性得到证实。
